scenario: presentationFor(type) for llm-wiki content. Under the recorded default (pageKind = the open type), the page kinds (concept/entity/note) and wiki-source are NOT in KNOWN_TYPES → generic fallback. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's byRelPath shape. SPECIFICATION golden (llm-wiki adapter = Chunk 4).
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — llm-wiki adapter is built in CHUNK 4.
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 / §3.4 (unknown type ⇒ generic renderer + `akm show <ref>`); §0.2 (the `wiki` asset-type dies); src/core/type-presentation.ts (TYPE_PRESENTATION has a 'wiki' entry → wiki-md, but 'wiki' is retired per §0.2); src/core/recognition-util.ts KNOWN_TYPES.
realWorldSource: src/output/renderers.ts wiki-md renderer (still present in code); src/wiki/wiki.ts page model
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. FLAG — this renderer golden depends directly on the CENTRAL AMBIGUITY flagged in recognition.json (what `type` a wiki page carries):

• Recorded DEFAULT (reading A, pageKind = type): concept/entity/note/wiki-source are NOT in KNOWN_TYPES → presentationFor returns DEFAULT_PRESENTATION {label:'Asset'}, renderer=null, generic action `akm show <ref>`. Wiki pages would render generically — the pre-existing `wiki-md` renderer (still in src/output/renderers.ts) would go UNUSED.

• ALTERNATIVE (reading B): Chunk 4 maps all wiki page kinds to the `wiki-md` renderer (label 'Wiki', action `akm show <ref> -> read the wiki page`), carrying pageKind as metadata. This keeps wiki rendering but reuses the retired-per-§0.2 `wiki` presentation. The `wiki-md` branch is shown per-entry as `alternativeRenderer` so Chunk 4 can adopt it without re-authoring.
This is the primary renderer decision for Chunk 4. The reserved files (schema/index/log) are not rendered as concepts.

pages/http-caching.md.label: Asset
pages/http-caching.md.flag: GENERIC FALLBACK under reading A (concept ∉ KNOWN_TYPES).

alternativeRenderer.label: Wiki
alternativeRenderer.action: akm show sample-wiki//pages/http-caching -> read the wiki page

pages/entities/varnish.md.label: Asset
pages/entities/varnish.md.flag: GENERIC FALLBACK under reading A (entity ∉ KNOWN_TYPES).

alternativeRenderer.action: akm show sample-wiki//pages/entities/varnish -> read the wiki page

pages/orphan.md.label: Asset
pages/orphan.md.flag: GENERIC FALLBACK under reading A (note ∉ KNOWN_TYPES).

alternativeRenderer.label: Wiki
alternativeRenderer.action: akm show sample-wiki//pages/orphan -> read the wiki page

raw/2026-07-http-rfc.md.label: Asset
raw/2026-07-http-rfc.md.flag: GENERIC FALLBACK (wiki-source ∉ KNOWN_TYPES). Raw sources are source material; a generic reader is the recorded default.
